front.title: Reclassification of Suite B Documents to Historic Status

abstract.t: This document reclassifies the RFCs related to the U.S. National Security Agency (NSA) Suite B cryptographic algorithms as Historic, and it discusses the reasons for doing so. This document moves RFC 5759, RFC 6239, RFC 6318, RFC 6379, RFC 6380, RFC 6403, and RFC 6460 to Historic Status.
